message:
beads: add ru (repo_updater) integration for skill sync (98 beads)

- Added meta_skill-327: RU (Repo Updater) Integration for Skill Sync
- Enables multi-machine skill repository synchronization
- Leverages ru's parallel sync, conflict detection, JSON output
- Integrates with skill discovery and bundle distribution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
